heading: Definition of weapon system component
label: 4425 Definition of weapon system component
text: In this subchapter, the term “weapon system component” has the meaning given the term “major system component” in .section 4401 of this title
notes: Amendments2021—, substituted “section 4401” for “section 2446a”.Pub. L. 116–283, § 1851(c)(5), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 116–283, § 1851(c)(1)section 2447e of this title
